name: posthog-js-rrweb
description: Subpath entry point exposing the @posthog/rrweb fork bundled inside posthog-js. Not published independently — lives inside the posthog-js tarball so consumers can `import 'posthog-js/rrweb'`. ESM-only: `module` and `main` both point at the ES bundle because every realistic consumer is a bundler (esbuild, webpack, vite, rollup) that picks `module` over `main`. Pure-Node `require()` is unsupported (rrweb is a browser-DOM library).
